rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disregard And Set Aside And Referees Tentative Report And Recommendations Re Plaintiffs Motion For Sanctions And Objections Thereto
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 19, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT FAY SERVICING, LLC, WILMINGTON TRUST, Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disregard And Set Aside And Referees Tentative Report And Recommendations Re Plaintiffs Motion For Sanctions And Objections Thereto is continued to December 17, 2020. This case is ordered to settlement conference on December 2, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. in department 603. A joint report re: settlement to be submitted by the parties no later than December 15, 2020. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DION ROBERTS VS. OCWEN LOAN SERVICING LLC A BUSINESS ENTITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 19, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT PHH MORTGAGE CORPORATION, WESTERN PROGRESSIVE, LLC, WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with final leave to amend. The Plaintiff failed to comply with the Court's prior ruling on the demurrer. Second Amended Complaint fails to include additional facts to support each element of each cause of action as to each defendant. Plaintiff shall have the final opportunity to allege each cause of action against each defendant. Plaintiff shall consult case law, statutes and/or cases to determine the elements of each cause of action (breach of implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing, intentional misrepresentation, negligent misrepresentation, unfair business practices) and allege facts in support of each element within each cause of action. All amendments shall be in bold font. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: NANCY MGGINNIS VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 19, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING INC., ABS LOAN TRUST VI DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT is continued to December 7, 2020 to be heard with other pending motion. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: YING Q. SUNG VS. GARY NELSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 19, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT GARY NELSON, JAY XU, MCALPIN APARTMENTS, LP, MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Claims included into the third, fourth and sixth cause of action based on service of the Three-Day Notice to Pay or Quit arise out of protected activity. Plaintiff has sufficiently shown probability of prevailing on the merits on those claims. =(501/CFH)
